message:
fix: Add missing ACFS_TEAL color definition

Fixes #54 - services-setup.sh was failing because ACFS_TEAL was
referenced but never defined in gum_ui.sh.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,6 +19,7 @@ ACFS_ERROR="#f38ba8"      # Red
 ACFS_MUTED="#6c7086"      # Gray
 ACFS_ACCENT="#cba6f7"     # Purple
 ACFS_PINK="#f5c2e7"       # Pink
+ACFS_TEAL="#94e2d5"       # Teal
 
 # ASCII Art Banner for ACFS
 print_banner() {
